riskClass: public API or external contract changes
workDescription: STAFF-004 Phase 1 — adds 4 new staff-gated API routes (GET/PATCH /api/staff/products, GET/PATCH /api/staff/branch) behind the existing requireStaff middleware. Trust boundary: staff may toggle product availability for their assigned branch and change branch operational settings. New types added to @jojopotato/types: StaffProduct, StaffBranchSettings.
